sources.name: CYVXAI-OS

known: Turn repository structure into a living capability graph.
Convert business signals into opportunity-ranked missions.
Use workflow automation to turn approved missions into actions.
Use evidence records to create compounding trust and learning.
Use agent orchestration to scale execution capacity.
Use SBOM/security proof as defensible operational intelligence.

active: Outcome evidence must be captured after execution to calibrate trust.
Mission recommendations must connect to executable workflows.
Agent orchestration needs assignment, review, and confidence gates.
Dependency and SBOM proof should become part of mission readiness.
Public deployment and runtime reliability are required for real adoption.

sources.top_constraint: Outcome evidence must be captured after execution to calibrate trust.
sources.top_opportunity: Turn repository structure into a living capability graph.
sources.next_best_action: Create an outcome capture flow so every mission updates evidence, learning, and trust.

mission.title: Close the Universal Intelligence Loop
mission.objective: Turn reality source analysis into mission execution, outcome evidence, trust calibration, and capability expansion.
mission.expected_outcome: CYVX becomes a self-improving capability operating system instead of a static dashboard.
